title: Native READ family E — blocks / dictionaries / xdata-xrecords reads
depends_on: M08A + M08B infra (merged to main) + M08C0 family seam

op_apis.inspect.entity.get_xdata: AcDbObject::xData(const ACHAR* regapp=nullptr) (dbObject.h:265) -> xdataBlocksJson; acutRelRb frees
op_apis.inspect.dictionary.get: AcDbDictionary::getAt(const ACHAR*, AcDbObjectId&) (dbdict.h:106); eKeyNotFound = found:false (normal miss, not error); sub-dict listing via dictionaryEntriesJson
op_apis.inspect.block.iterate: getBlockTable -> AcDbBlockTable::getAt(ACDB_MODEL_SPACE|name)/resolveHandle -> AcDbBlockTableRecord::newIterator -> AcDbBlockTableRecordIterator::getEntity (dbsymtb.h:1654); serializeEntityCommon per entity

gate_mechanism: familyHasOp(op) (the family seam). NOT added to kAriadneNativeOperationTable -> dispatcher-table parity invariant (test_m08b_dispatcher_table) untouched; m08e op== comparisons are #included before ariadneNativeJob() so they are outside the scanned dispatcher region.

catalogued_remaining_detail.reason: appends entity to a BTR (original-DWG mutation) -> M08G write lane, not a read-only family
adds/replaces a NOD/dict entry (mutation) -> write lane
attaches xdata, needs regapp in APPID (mutation) -> write lane
deepCloneObjects is a host-only mutation mechanism; not read-only, not headless
AcDbDatabase::insert creates a BTR + copies entities (mutation) -> write lane
constructs a NEW AcDbDatabase; the headless job already owns/serves the working DB; side-DB creation is runtime/infra, not a read on ctx.pDb
the host-application-services subclass IS the accoreconsole host bootstrap (already provided by the running .crx host); not a per-job READ handler action

build.isolation: built in a dedicated git worktree (D:/dev/99_tools/_m08e_wt) pinned to the branch commit, to avoid the shared-checkout race with concurrent M08C/M08D agents in the main directory

tests: pytest tests/unit/test_m08e_handlers.py = 11 passed (HasOp<->Dispatch parity for the 4 reads; 7 write ops not claimed; read-only token scan on comment-stripped code; kForRead-only opens; UTF-8 via njsonStr; in-TU serializer reuse)
pytest tests/unit = 289 passed, 13 skipped, 0 failed (no regression; test_m08c0_family_seam + test_m08b_dispatcher_table still green)
hard_constraints: read-only (no save/saveAs/_QSAVE, no acedCommand/acedCmd, no append/set/clone, no acdbSetHostApplicationServices); every acdbOpenObject is kForRead; UTF-8 fidelity via njsonStr (Korean layer/block names); no fake PASS; reuses in-TU primitives (no re-rolled encoders); no secrets
next: Merge PR #8 to main (with sibling C/D/F via the merge orchestrator). Direct-ARIADNE_NATIVE_JOB runtime smoke for these 4 reads belongs to MERGE-M08-READ (router routes catalogued ops to the managed plane; the native gate fires only on a direct ARIADNE_NATIVE_JOB harness). Write ops (append/set/clone/insert/create) -> M08G write lane.
